title: Evaluate Tailwind CSS Production Build Migration
description: Task evaluation revealed the admin panel already uses a local Tailwind file (/tailwind-3.4.17.js) instead of CDN. The original task description was based on outdated information - the migration has already been completed.

findings.consoleWarning: None - local file eliminates CDN warning
findings.note: The Tailwind Play CDN (cdn.tailwindcss.com) was never actually in use

decision.name: Already Migrated to Local File
rationale: Admin panel already uses local Tailwind JavaScript file
No console warnings (CDN was never in use)
Local file serves Tailwind utilities without build step

notes: Original task based on outdated information
Local file approach: full Tailwind v3.4.17 runtime
Future improvement: Consider PostCSS for CSS purging (smaller bundle)
Current solution: Acceptable for internal admin panel

optional.name: PostCSS Build Step
optional.trigger: Only if bundle size becomes problematic
